g.text: Blelloch Scan - Downsweep Phase (Exclusive Prefix Sum)
INV: Root (temp[7]) set to 0 before starting.
All internal sums from upsweep are in temp array.

div.p: indices: ai=3, bi=7 t = temp[3] (11) temp[3] = temp[7] (0) temp[7] = 0 + 11 = 11

g.text: temp[7] becomes sum of Level 3 nodes

div.p: tid=0: ai=1, bi=3 t = temp[1] (4) temp[1] = temp[3] (0) temp[3] = 0 + 4 = 4

g.text: Result is the full Exclusive Prefix Sum

text.tspan: for (int d = 1; d < N; d <<= 1) { // Downsweep
